chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI CP No.S-211 of 2024 [Abdul Aziz vs. Commissioner for Workers Compensation and Others ] Date Order with signature of Judge Hg/Priority. 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of CMA No. 2208/2024. 3. For hearing of main case. 11.08.2025. Mr. Aamir Raza Naqvi, advocate for the petitioner. M/s. Ahsan Mehmood and Saira Khan, advocates for private respondents. M/s. Syed Aly-e-Maqbool Rizvi & Ziauddin Junejo, AAGs Sindh. ----------- Through this Constitutional Petition under Article 199 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973, the petitioner has assailed the common order dated 11.05.2023, passed by learned Commissioner for Workers’ Compensation, Respondent No.1 herein. At the very outset, it has been stated that the order impugned in the present proceedings has been passed without hearing the learned counsel for the petitioner. After hearing the learned counsel for the parties, at some length, by consent, this Constitutional Petition is disposed of in the following terms: “The impugned order dated 11.05.2023 passed in the instant proceedings is set aside and the case is remanded back to the court of Commissioner For Workers’ Compensation & Authority [West Division] Karachi, to decide the case afresh after providing hearing to all the parties strictly in accordance with law within a period of four months’ time.” Petition stands disposed of alongwith pending application. JUDGE jamil
